name: Malt Magnus
notes: Swedish retailer. Stocks ChemiPro range (via Brouwland), PBW (powder + tablets), StellarClean, Enzybrew 10, Grainfather HPC, Star San. SDS documents on maltmagnus.se are Swedish-language EU REACH/CLP documents produced by KemRisk Sweden AB.

name: Ölbryggning
notes: Swedish retailer. Stocks ChemClean (Chemisphere), ChemiPro OXI, Enzybrew 10, VWP (out of scope), Pipeline range, PBW, Star San, Sanipro Rinse, Chemsan.

name: Mr-Malt
notes: Swedish retailer. Stocks Grainfather HPC, PBW, Star San, general homebrew range.

name: Hembryggeriet
notes: Swedish retailer. Stocks Sanipro Rinse, PBW, ChemClean, Star San, general homebrew range.

name: Köksbryggeriet
notes: Swedish retailer. Stocks PBW, Sanipro Rinse.

name: The Homebrewery
notes: EU homebrew retailer. Stocks Sanipro Rinse.

name: KegLand EU
notes: EU distributor for KegLand products. Stocks StellarClean, StellarSan, ChemiPro DES, Chemsan. EU-market SDSs available on kegland.eu product pages.

name: Brouwland
notes: Belgian homebrew retailer and distributor. Primary source and manufacturer-equivalent for ChemiPro range. Sells via own site and through Swedish/EU retailers.

name: Five Star Chemicals
notes: US manufacturer of Star San and PBW. Products available in EU/SE via homebrew retailers. No EU-direct retail; listed here as manufacturer-as-vendor for linking purposes only.

name: Chemisphere UK
notes: UK manufacturer of ChemClean and Chemsan. Products sold into EU market via ölbryggning.se and others.

name: Behrens Group AB
notes: Swedish manufacturer of Sanipro Rinse. Product sold primarily through hembryggeriet.se and other Swedish retailers.

name: KegLand AU
notes: Australian source. Origin of StellarClean and StellarSan. AU-market SDSs in Australian NOHSC format.
